title: Villager Fisherman’s Hut
description: Adds a Villager fisherman hut to the plains biome
body:
### Villager Fisherman’s Hut
**This mod adds a Villager Fisherman’s Hut to the game, featuring fisherman villagers living and working inside the new hut.**

![House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f888c8721764dad72111e1422b0f3233557f5702.jpeg)

- You’ll also find ocean themed loot throughout the structure, along with a small fishing net positioned to the side of the hut.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65bfd9cc8a901ea47b20eee5002019f47850ed25.jpeg)

- The Villager Fisherman’s Hut can spawn in the Plains and Sunflower Plains biomes.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpack
